# Data Directory

This directory holds generated artifacts for local development and experiments.

* `beer_game_dev.db` is created automatically when the backend falls back to a SQLite database. The file is ignored by git so local reseeding no longer introduces binary diffs when preparing pull requests.
* Additional datasets (for example under `basic_processed/` or JSON exports) may also be regenerated by seeding scripts.

No checked-in SQLite databases are required for the application to run; the initialization scripts will create any missing files on demand.
